inputs.label: Average Inventory
inputs.businessContext: The average value of inventory held during the period. Typically (Beginning Inventory + Ending Inventory) / 2.

businessContext_i18n.en: The average value of inventory held during the period. Typically (Beginning Inventory + Ending Inventory) / 2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem boyunca elde tutulan ortalama stok değeri. Genellikle (Dönem Başı Stok + Dönem Sonu Stok) / 2.

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)
inputs.businessContext: The total cost of goods sold during the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total cost of goods sold during the period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem boyunca satılan malların toplam maliyeti.

inputs.label: Period Length (Days)
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in the measurement period. Standard is 365 for annual calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days in the measurement period. Standard is 365 for annual calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm dönemindeki gün sayısı. Yıllık hesaplama için standart 365'tir.

inputs.label: Inventory Turnover Ratio (Optional)
inputs.businessContext: If known, enter the inventory turnover ratio (COGS / Average Inventory). If provided, DIO will be calculated as Period Days / Turnover Ratio. Leave 0 to calculate from Average Inventory and COGS.

businessContext_i18n.en: If known, enter the inventory turnover ratio (COGS / Average Inventory). If provided, DIO will be calculated as Period Days / Turnover Ratio. Leave 0 to calculate from Average Inventory and COGS.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Biliniyorsa, stok devir hızını (SMM / Ortalama Stok) girin. Sağlanırsa, DIO = Dönem Günü / Devir Hızı olarak hesaplanır. Ortalama Stok ve SMM'den hesaplamak için 0 bırakın.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
